data.title: Family Offices Embrace Alternative Investment Funds To Protect Wealth In 2025
data.description: Family offices are increasingly investing in AIFs to diversify risk and protect wealth in volatile markets. Advisors should focus on expertise and customization to meet this demand.

data.title: Trump's Crypto Reserve Plan Sparks Controversy, Schiff Questions XRP Inclusion, Polymarket CEO Invited To White House: This Week In Crypto
data.description: The crypto world was shaken as Trump's announcement of a U.S. cryptocurrency reserve sparked backlash from tech allies, criticism from economist Peter Schiff, and calls for a Congressional investigation into potential insider trading and market manipulation.

data.title: Apple's Tumultuous Week – From Siri Delays, Legal Battles, And New Product Teasers: This Week In Appleverse
data.description: The past week was a rollercoaster for Apple with delays in AI upgrades, legal challenges and product teasers.

data.title: Buffett's Tariff Warning, Trump's CHIPS Act Repeal, And S&P 500's Post-Election Slump: This Week In Economics
data.description: The financial markets faced turbulence as Warren Buffett warned tariffs are "an act of war," Trump called for ending the CHIPS Act, the S&P 500 erased post-election gains, and the U.S. dollar saw its sharpest two-day decline in years amid ongoing economic uncertainty.

data.title: Trump Tariffs, Economic 'detox', And Congressional Funds Freeze: This Week In Politics
data.description: Trump's tariff threats, Bessent's 'detox' remarks, and federal judge's block on freeze of funds made headlines. Canada, Mexico, & US trade tensions continue.
